task_completion.description: SmartDesk Pro product template created with 6 variants (2 sizes x 3 finishes). Size attribute has Standard and Large values. Finish attribute has Oak, White, and Walnut values.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product form showing 'SmartDesk Pro' with Attributes & Variants tab displaying Size (Standard, Large) and Finish (Oak, White, Walnut) attributes. Variant count should show 6.

task_completion.description: Price extras correctly set: Large size adds +$300, Walnut finish adds +$200. Base list price is $1,200.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Product variant configuration showing price extras on attribute values, or variant prices reflecting correct base + extras.

task_completion.description: Motorized Lift Frame product created with a BOM containing: Linear Actuator x2, Steel Frame x1, Control Unit x1, Cable Harness x1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: BOM form for 'Motorized Lift Frame' showing 4 component lines with correct products and quantities.

task_completion.description: Main SmartDesk Pro BOM includes Motorized Lift Frame x1 and Hardware Kit x1 with NO variant restrictions (applied to all variants).
task_completion.visual_evidence: BOM form for SmartDesk Pro showing Motorized Lift Frame and Hardware Kit lines with empty 'Apply on Variants' column.

task_completion.description: Main SmartDesk Pro BOM has variant-conditional Desktop Surface lines: Oak Board restricted to Oak finish variants, White Laminate to White variants, Walnut Board to Walnut variants.
task_completion.visual_evidence: BOM form showing three surface component lines each with specific variant restrictions in the 'Apply on Variants' column. Oak Board shows Oak variants, White Laminate shows White variants, Walnut Board shows Walnut variants.

task_completion.description: Pricelist 'Authorized Dealer Network' created with 3 tiers: 1-4 units at list price, 5-9 units at 15% discount, 10+ units at 25% discount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Pricelist form showing 'Authorized Dealer Network' with discount rules at quantity breaks 1, 5, and 10 with corresponding percentage discounts.

task_completion.description: Manufacturing order for 1x SmartDesk Pro Standard/Walnut completed (state = Done). The MO consumed Motorized Lift Frame, Walnut Board, and Hardware Kit — NOT Oak Board or White Laminate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Manufacturing order form showing Done state for a SmartDesk Pro variant, with component consumption showing Motorized Lift Frame, Walnut Board, and Hardware Kit.

task_completion.description: Sales order for Cascade Furniture Partners confirmed with 8x SmartDesk Pro Standard/Walnut using the 'Authorized Dealer Network' pricelist. Order total is $9,520.00 (untaxed).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sales order form showing Cascade Furniture Partners as customer, Authorized Dealer Network pricelist, 8 units of SmartDesk Pro Standard/Walnut at $1,190/unit, state = Sales Order, total approximately $9,520.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to interact with Odoo GUI throughout the task.
All products, BOMs, pricelists, and orders were created through genuine Odoo UI interaction, not via direct database manipulation or script execution.
Agent did not inspect setup scripts or task configuration files to obtain answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm.test_mo: 1x Standard/Walnut, should consume Motorized Lift Frame + Walnut Board + Hardware Kit
